name: Ready 2 Mingle
overview: Welcome to the world of Ready 2 Mingle. Meet the modern day cupids Nirav and Myra as they make the world fall in love with each other and themselves. But does true love really exist in this time and age? Watch the trailer to get a sneak peek to their world of fun, parties, love and the crazy twists of modern day relationships.

trailers.title: Ready 2 Mingle | Official Trailer | Aahana Kumra & Amol Parashar | New Series | The Zoom Studios
